scenes.narration: Want to know the BEST day to buy gold?
When the Moon enters Pushya nakshatra on a Thursday — that's called Guru Pushya Yoga. It happens only 4 times a year.
Pushya is ruled by Brihaspati — Jupiter, the planet of abundance. Thursday is also Jupiter's day. Double Jupiter energy means everything you buy multiplies in value.
That's why jewelers across India have massive sales on Guru Pushya Yoga. Now you know why.
Find the next Guru Pushya date at Dekho Panchang.
